    • Method Detail

      • cancelAllTasks

        public void cancelAllTasks()
        This method cancels all running requests.

      • connectToDeviceViaBluetooth

        public void connectToDeviceViaBluetooth(@NonNull
                                        java.lang.String wcmBlePrefix,
                                        @NonNull
                                        android.content.Context context,
                                        @NonNull
                                        BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback callback)
        Connects to device via Bluetooth.
        Parameters:
        wcmBlePrefix - WCM BLE service prefix.
        context - Application Context.
        callback - BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • getBluetoothService

        public static BluetoothService getBluetoothService()

      • getDeviceInfoViaBluetooth

        public void getDeviceInfoViaBluetooth(@NonNull
                                      BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback callback)
        This method gathers device info via Bluetooth.
        Parameters:
        callback - BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceInfoCallback
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • identifyYourself

        public void identifyYourself(@NonNull
                             android.content.Context context,
                             @NonNull
                             BluetoothService.BluetoothIdentificationCallback callback)
        Optional method to have the device perform some identifying action, such as flashing a light or playing a sound.
        Parameters:
        context - Application context.
        callback - Will be called when identification request will be sent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • isBleSupported

        public boolean isBleSupported(@NonNull
                              android.content.Context context)

      • putPrivateCredentialsViaBluetooth

        public void putPrivateCredentialsViaBluetooth(boolean isHiddenNetwork,
                                              int priority,
                                              @NonNull
                                              android.content.Context context,
                                              @NonNull
                                              com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.net.model.WiFiNetwork selectedNetwork,
                                              @NonNull
                                              java.lang.String preSharedKey,
                                              @NonNull
                                              BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback callback)
        Sends credentials via Bluetooth and starts to check joining status(directly via BT) to see if the device has successfully joined the private network.
        Parameters:
        isHiddenNetwork - true if you want to connect device to hidden network.
        priority - Network priority. Priority value should be between 150 and 255.
        context - Application Context.
        selectedNetwork - WiFiNetwork object that contains all required info about selected network.
        preSharedKey - preSharedKey of desired network which you want to connect your device.
        callback - BluetoothService.BluetoothCredentialsSenderCallback
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setBluetoothDeviceStatusTimings

        public BluetoothService setBluetoothDeviceStatusTimings(int bluetoothDeviceStatusDelay,
                                                        int bluetoothDeviceStatusMaxRequestCount)
        This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet checks device joining status via Bluetooth LE.
        Parameters:
        bluetoothDeviceStatusDelay - Delay between attempts.
        bluetoothDeviceStatusMaxRequestCount - Maximum amount of requests.
        Returns:
        BluetoothService instance.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - Will be thrown in case when incorrect parameter is passed.

      • setProgressView

        public BluetoothService setProgressView(com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.CirrentProgressView customProgressView)
        This method allows to set a custom progress view that will be shown during requests execution.
        Parameters:
        customProgressView - Custom progress view object that implements CirrentProgressView interface.
        Returns:
        BluetoothService instance.
